chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1374 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 07-10-2025 Mr. Saeed Ahmed Wassan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< Mr. Mujeeb-ur-Rehman Malano, Advocate holding brief for Mr. Imdad Ali Malik, Counsel for the Petitioner, under instructions, does not press the instant Constitutional Petition and submits that in the first instance, the Petitioner for redressal of his grievance will approach before the Secretary, Local Government Department, Government of Sindh by way of filing Application; in case, the grievance of the Petitioner is not redressed, he will avail his alternate remedy provided under the law. The proposal so made by the Counsel is not opposed by learned AAG. Order accordingly. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
